ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "mssubclass" INTEGER /* Identifies the type of dwelling involved in the sale */,
  "lot_frontage" REAL /* Linear feet of street connected to property */,
  "lot_area" INTEGER /* Lot size in square feet */,
  "overall_qual" INTEGER /* Rates the overall material and finish of the house */,
  "overall_cond" INTEGER /* Rates the overall condition of the house */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Original construction date */,
  "year_remod_add" INTEGER /* Remodel date */,
  "mas_vnr_area" INTEGER /* Masonry veneer area in square feet */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf1" INTEGER /* Type 1 finished square feet */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf2" INTEGER /* Type 2 finished square feet */,
  "bsmt_unf_sf" INTEGER /* Unfinished square feet of basement area */,
  "total_bsmt_sf" INTEGER /* Total square feet of basement area */,
  "first_flr_sf" INTEGER /* First Floor square feet */,
  "second_flr_sf" INTEGER /* Second floor square feet */,
  "low_qual_fin_sf" INTEGER /* Low quality finished square feet (all floors) */,
  "grLiv_area" INTEGER /* Above grade (ground) living area square feet */,
  "bsmt_full_bath" INTEGER /* Basement full bathrooms */,
  "bsmt_half_bath" INTEGER /* Basement half bathrooms */,
  "full_bath" INTEGER /* Above grade full bathrooms */,
  "half_bath" INTEGER /* Above grade half bathrooms */,
  "bedroom_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Bedrooms above grade */,
  "kitchen_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Kitchens above grade */,
  "tot_rms_abv_grd" INTEGER /* Total rooms above grade */,
  "fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces */,
  "garage_yr_blt" INTEGER /* Year garage was built */,
  "garage_cars" INTEGER /* Size of garage in car capacity */,
  "garage_area" INTEGER /* Size of garage in square feet */,
  "wood_deck_sf" INTEGER /* Wood deck area in square feet */,
  "open_porch_sf" INTEGER /* Open porch area in square feet */,
  "enclosed_porch" INTEGER /* Enclosed porch area in square feet */,
  "three_ssn_porch" INTEGER /* Three season porch area in square feet */,
  "screen_porch" INTEGER /* Screen porch area in square feet */,
  "pool_area" INTEGER /* Pool area in square feet */,
  "misc_val" INTEGER /* Miscellaneous feature not covered in other categories */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month sold */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, condo) */,
  "lot_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the lot */,
  "land_contour" TEXT /* Flatness or slope of the property */,
  "utilities" TEXT /* Availability of utilities */,
  "land_slope" TEXT /* Slope of the property */,
  "condition_1" TEXT /* First condition of the property */,
  "condition_2" TEXT /* Second condition of the property */,
  "roof_style" TEXT /* Style of the roof */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof */,
  "exterior_1st" TEXT /* Exterior covering on house */,
  "exterior_2nd" TEXT /* If more than one exterior material, what is the second */,
  "mas_vnr_type" TEXT /* Masonry veneer type */,
  "exter_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the exterior materials */,
  "exter_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the exterior materials */,
  "foundation" TEXT /* Type of foundation */,
  "bsmt_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the basement */,
  "bsmt_exposure" TEXT /* Walkout or garden level basement walls */,
  "bsmt_fin_type_1" TEXT /* Rating of basement finished area */,
  "bsmt_fin_type_2" TEXT /* Rating of basement finished area (if multiple types) */,
  "heating" TEXT /* Type of heating */,
  "heating_qc" TEXT /* Heating quality and condition */,
  "central_air" TEXT /* Central air conditioning (Y/N) */,
  "electrical" TEXT /* Electrical system */,
  "kitchen_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the kitchen */,
  "functional" TEXT /* Home functionality (assumes typical unless deductions are warranted) */,
  "fireplace_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the fireplace */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage */,
  "garage_finish" TEXT /* Interior finish of the garage */,
  "garage_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the garage */,
  "garage_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the garage */,
  "paved_drive" TEXT /* Paved driveway (Y/N) */,
  "pool_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the pool */,
  "fence" TEXT /* Quality of the fence */,
  "misc_feature" TEXT /* Miscellaneous feature (e.g., shed, tennis court) */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., warranty deed, court order) */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sale (e.g., normal, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the property was sold */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale type */,
  "sale_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale condition */,
  "sale_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the listing before sale */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing agent */,
  "buying_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buying agent */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, appraiser) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user works for */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating how well the property matches the user's preferences */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., user preferences, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
